metadata.description: Spawn N parallel Claude Code worker agents in colored tmux panes (each in its own git worktree) with a coordinator pane that merges branches and pushes a single PR. Adds the /spawn-team slash command.

plugins.name: orchestrate-tmux-team
plugins.description: Spawn N parallel Claude Code worker agents in colored tmux panes (each in its own git worktree) with a coordinator pane that merges branches and pushes a single PR. Adds the /spawn-team slash command. Useful for features that split cleanly into 2-4 disjoint workers (separate files, parallel-friendly scopes).
